name: chisel
title: chisel
description:
fast TCP/UDP tunnel over HTTP (program)
This package contains a fast TCP/UDP tunnel, transported over HTTP, secured
via SSH. Single executable including both client and server.  Chisel is mainly
useful for passing through firewalls, though it can also be used to provide a
secure endpoint into your network.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use chisel because fast TCP/UDP tunnel over HTTP (program).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use chisel as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `chisel [options] [args]` as documented upstream for chisel.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair chisel with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `chisel --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
